allowed_actions: Edit contract-owned shared domain, model metadata, fixtures, and architecture documentation
verification_requirements: Consumers can use fixtures without undocumented assumptions
notes: This lane establishes interfaces before application and ML consumers proceed in parallel.

allowed_actions: Edit application-owned Android, shared UI, application, and local data areas
verification_requirements: Persistence, metadata removal, search/filter, export, and import tests pass
notes: May use a deterministic fake recognition engine until the ML adapter satisfies the same contract.

allowed_actions: Edit ML, model, inference-adapter, and ML-verification areas
verification_requirements: Selected-device latency and size gates pass
notes: The Figshare dataset and 163-class boundary are selected. Release approval remains blocked on checkpoint provenance/class-order inspection, independent evaluation, ONNX compatibility, and accepted size/device gates.

allowed_actions: Edit verification, test, and verification-documentation areas
verification_requirements: All acceptance signals are independently evidenced
No task or release is accepted from self-reported proof alone
notes: Runs alongside implementation for early contract tests and becomes the final release gate.
